result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [options]

Commands:
  --help               Display this help message.
  init                 Initialize a new project.

Options for init:
  app-name             Specify the name of the application. (No spaces allowed.)
  template-type        Specify the template type. ('default' or 'loyalty').
  primary-color        Specify the primary color for the application in hexadecimal format (e.g., #000000).

Examples:
  spider --help
  spider init
